sky.f1.uk.description: This is the story of the 2025 F1 world championship - an unforgettable one for those stood tall at the end, full of twists and turns in the race the drivers' and constructors' titles.

sky.f1.uk.title: F1 2026 Barcelona Shakedown
sky.f1.uk.description: Ted Kravitz is joined by Sky F1's leading voices to bring behind-the-scenes stories from shakedown week in Barcelona, with all the latest news and reaction in the run up to the 2026 season.

sky.f1.uk.title: Sao Paulo F1 GP: Sprint
sky.f1.uk.description: The season's penultimate F1 Sprint at Interlagos. Championship leader Lando Norris has pole as title rivals Oscar Piastri and Max Verstappen start from third and sixth respectively. (08.11)

sky.f1.uk.title: Sao Paulo F1 GP: Qualifying
sky.f1.uk.description: Attention turns to Sunday's Sao Paulo Grand Prix with Formula 1 qualifying at Interlagos, as the drivers attempt to battle their way through to Q3 for a shot at pole position. (08.11)

sky.f1.uk.title: Ted's Quali Notebook
sky.f1.uk.description: Ted Kravitz is live as he gathers reaction from inside the paddock and reviews all the biggest stories from qualifying at the Sao Paulo Grand Prix.

sky.f1.uk.title: F1 2026 Barcelona Shakedown
sky.f1.uk.description: Ted Kravitz is joined by Sky F1's leading voices to bring behind-the-scenes stories from shakedown week in Barcelona, with all the latest news and reaction in the run up to the 2026 season.

sky.f1.uk.title: Carlos Sainz & The Lie Detector
sky.f1.uk.description: Williams' Carlos Sainz is the latest Formula 1 driver to brave the Lie Detector.

sky.f1.uk.title: Grand Prix Sunday: Sao Paulo
sky.f1.uk.description: Join Sky Sports F1 on the grid ahead of the start of the race at the Sao Paulo Grand Prix.

sky.f1.uk.title: Sao Paulo F1 Grand Prix
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out at Interlagos. An opportunity presents itself to poleman Lando Norris in the chase for the championship with Oscar Piastri starting P4 and Max Verstappen way down the grid.

sky.f1.uk.title: Chequered Flag: Sao Paulo
sky.f1.uk.description: As the chequered flag comes down on the 2025 Sao Paulo Grand Prix, join Sky Sports F1 for all the reaction and analysis.

sky.f1.uk.title: F1 Explained: Rules of Engagement
sky.f1.uk.description: In the next instalment of the F1 Explained series, Karun Chandhok looks at Formula 1's guidelines for driving standards.

sky.f1.uk.title: Ted's Notebook:
sky.f1.uk.description: Ted Kravitz is live following the Sao Paulo Grand Prix, as he shares his thoughts on the race while gathering reaction from the paddock.

sky.f1.uk.title: Red Bull Detroit Launch with Craig
sky.f1.uk.description: Sky Sports News' Craig Slater reports from Red Bull and Racing Bulls' launch in Detroit, the home of the team's new engine partner Ford.

sky.f1.uk.title: Sao Paulo F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out at Interlagos. An opportunity presents itself to poleman Lando Norris in the title chase with Oscar Piastri starting P4 and Max Verstappen way down the grid. (09.11)

sky.f1.uk.title: Las Vegas F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: As the lights go out on the Strip for the Las Vegas Grand Prix, championship leader Lando Norris starts from P1 with Max Verstappen behind. Oscar Piastri lines up in fifth place. (23.11)

sky.f1.uk.title: Qatar F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out in Qatar. As Lando Norris lines up in P2 a win away from the world championship, it's down to polesitter Oscar Piastri and Max Verstappen to deny the Brit the title. (30.11)

sky.mix.uk.title: NRLW Grand Final Highlights 2025
sky.mix.uk.description: The Stadium Australia hosts its second Grand Final of the day, as the Sydney Roosters and Brisbane Broncos lock horns in the culmination of the NRLW season. (05.10)

sky.mix.uk.title: PGA Tour Golf Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: The last day of the PGA Tour's Farmers Insurance Open, held at Torrey Pines Golf Course in San Diego. Last year, Harris English ended a four-year wait for a win here. (01.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:Stoke/L'Pool '15
sky.mix.uk.description: Stoke: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. For Stoke City, the 6-1 win over Liverpool on the final day of the 2014-15 season.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest: N'castle/S'land 2013
sky.mix.uk.description: Sunderland: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. For Sunderland, the 3-0 win at rivals Newcastle in 2013, their first there in 13 years.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest:Watford/Liverpool 2015
sky.mix.uk.description: Watford: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. Here, for Watford, the 3-0 win over Liverpool at Vicarage Road in December 2015.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:WHU/Man Utd '16
sky.mix.uk.description: West Ham: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. Here, for West Ham, their 3-2 win over Man Utd in their final game at Upton Park.

sky.mix.uk.title: Australian F1 GP Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: A McLaren one-two forms the front row for the Australian Grand Prix, as Lando Norris leads from Oscar Piastri. Max Verstappen starts third, while Lewis Hamilton begins from P8. (16.03)

sky.mix.uk.title: Chinese F1 GP Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: It's a first Grand Prix pole for Oscar Piastri as George Russell splits the McLarens with Lando Norris starting third. Sprint winner Lewis Hamilton comes from fifth on the grid. (23.03)

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 13/14: Sheff Weds v Leeds Utd
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive a classic match from the Football League. Here, Yorkshire rivals Sheffield Wednesday and Leeds United meet at Hillsborough in January 2014 in a memorable game for the Owls.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 13/14: Derby County v N.Forest
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic clash from the English Football League. Here, Derby County meet Nottingham Forest in the Sky Bet Championship.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 13/14: QPR v N. Forest
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive a classic match from the English Football League. Here, QPR host Nottingham Forest at Loftus Road in the 2013-14 season in a seven-goal thriller.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 14/15: Brentford v Fulham
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, a west London derby in the Sky Bet Championship between Brentford and Fulham at Griffin Park in November 2014.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: Andre Agassi and Pete Sampras met in the 2001 Indian Wells final - one of 34 career meetings. Agassi eyed a second consecutive win over Sampras in their first meeting in over a year.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: In the 1996 Indian Wells final, Steffi Graf - having made her competitive return after a four-month injury layoff - would compete with Spain's Conchita Martinez for the title.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 14/15: Derby County v N.Forest
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive some classic English Football League action. Here, a Midlands derby in the Sky Bet Championship between Derby County and Nottingham Forest at the iPro Stadium in January 2015.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 14/15: Norwich v Ipswich
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive some classic action from the EFL. Here, Norwich City and Ipswich Town clash in an East Anglian derby at Carrow Road back in March 2015.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 14/15: Wolves v Leeds Utd
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive some classic action from the EFL. Here, Wolverhampton Wanderers host Leeds United at Molineux in April 2015 in a thrilling game that saw seven goals.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 14/15: Swindon v Sheff Utd
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive a classic match from the English Football League. Here, Swindon Town host Sheffield United at the County Ground in a 10-goal thriller in the play-offs back in May 2015.

sky.mix.uk.title: PGA Tour Golf Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: The last day of the PGA Tour's Farmers Insurance Open, held at Torrey Pines Golf Course in San Diego. Last year, Harris English ended a four-year wait for a win here. (01.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: S/Lge: Hull FC v Leigh
sky.mix.uk.description: Hull FC play host to Leigh Leopard in the Betfred Super League. Adrian Lam's third-placed Leigh target an immediate response after tasting defeat to Leeds Rhinos last time out.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 08/09: Millwall v Scunthorpe
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic clash from the English Football League. Here, Millwall face Scunthorpe at Wembley Stadium in the League 1 play-off final in 2009.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: In a battle of generations, two of the all-time greats Roger Federer and Andre Agassi fought for the year-end championship in 2003. Federer was aiming for his first title on American soil.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches

Blaze.uk.description: Cody Rhodes: As the son of Hall of Famer Dusty Rhodes, Cody Rhodes has carved a path for himself like no other Superstar in WWE history. (S1, ep 10)

Blaze.uk.title: Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters
Blaze.uk.description: The Missing Giants: The team sets its sights on the vanishings of two ships. Did a Bermuda Triangle tsunami claim them or did they fall prey to Nazi U-Boats? (S2, ep 2)

Blaze.uk.title: Alien Files Reopened
Blaze.uk.description: A team of experts investigate some of the most well-known UFO cases of the last 75 years, hoping to uncover the truth. (S1, ep 3)

Blaze.uk.title: Deep Water Salvage

Blaze.uk.title: Dickinson's Real Deal

Channel4.uk.description: Maria and Paul dream of owning a home away from home in the Andalucian countryside, where they can escape from the English winters. Can Craig Rowe find the one for their budget of £270k?

Channel4.uk.title: A New Life in the Sun
Channel4.uk.description: The new series continues. In France, chateau owners Sharon and David roll out the red carpet for a hen party. Italian bureaucracy threatens ex-soap star Stephen's dream. (S11 Ep22)

Channel4.uk.title: Chateau DIY: Win the Dream
Channel4.uk.description: The new series continues. It's the first elimination of the second heat... Whose attic is giving snug as a bug in a rug? And who will guest judges Donna and Paul put through? (Ep7/20)

Channel4.uk.title: New: A Place in the Sun
Channel4.uk.description: Maggy and Lion want a place big enough to work from home while living the good life in verdant, historic Umbria in Italy. Can they find somewhere that's just right for them?

Channel4.uk.title: Channel 4 News
Channel4.uk.description: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

Channel4.uk.title: New: Bargain Holiday Secrets
Channel4.uk.description: Industry insiders reveal how to get a great holiday at a bargain price. First up, cruises. Jasmine Harman shows us how to enjoy a bon voyage without splashing out. (Ep1)

Channel4.uk.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
Channel4.uk.description: The Search for Justice: In Luton, a man is shot in the chest by a stranger. The same suspect threatens a woman. A frantic manhunt is launched to catch the gunman before he strikes again.

Channel4.uk.title: New: 999: What Happened Next
Channel4.uk.description: An average day in Peterborough is rocked by a spree of violent attacks. In Wales, a young woman dies suspiciously in a car crash. Police launch investigations into two shocking cases. (Ep2)

Channel4.uk.title: Night Coppers
Channel4.uk.description: In the centre of Brighton, a lone officer is violently attacked and urgently needs back-up. And a disorientated drunk going home to bed tries to smash his way into the wrong house. (S2 Ep5)

Channel4.uk.title: Secret Genius with Alan Carr...
Channel4.uk.description: ...& Susie Dent: Ordinary people with extraordinary minds compete to be crowned Secret Genius. The contestants enjoy an 'Eye Scream' challenge and quickfire chaos. (Ep1/6) [SL]

Channel4.uk.title: Secret Genius with Alan Carr...
Channel4.uk.description: ...& Susie Dent: Twelve new contestants face a 'wheely' hard word game and a confectionary test. But with few final places up for grabs, it won't be a sweet ending for some... (Ep2/6) [SL]

Channel4.uk.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
Channel4.uk.description: Four Seasons Inn: Gordon Ramsay visits West Dover in Vermont, where a dog-friendly hotel is run like a hostel - with unpaid staff, instead of paying guests, staying in the rooms. (S2 Ep5/8) [SL]

Channel4.uk.title: The Last Leg
Channel4.uk.description: Tom Davis and Ellie Taylor join Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker as they return with the 34th series, offering their unique satirical insight into world events. (S34 Ep1) [SL]

Channel4.uk.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
Channel4.uk.description: In Bristol, the table talk ranges from romantic meetings to naked gardening, and the purple mash is more like Play-Doh, as Colin and Mandy, PJ and Owen, and joker Geoff and Gemma compete.

Channel4.uk.title: Kirstie's House of Craft
Channel4.uk.description: Kirstie Allsopp shows us how to create beautiful crafts with items we already own. She makes a fun garland from paper, a beautiful spring wreath, and a string-art hot air balloon.

Channel4.uk.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or...
Channel4.uk.description: ...List It: Phil revisits Mark and Suze, who were at loggerheads over their Victorian town house in Cullercoats in North Tyneside. Did they follow through on their final decision? (S6 Ep6)

Channel4.uk.title: Countdown
Channel4.uk.description: Another chance to catch yesterday's new episode, with Dr Ranj Singh in Dictionary Corner. Les Dennis, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host.

Channel4.uk.title: Cheers
Channel4.uk.description: Call Me Irresponsible: Carla's convinced that Eddie will remember their second wedding anniversary, even though he's travelling with the ice show. (S7 Ep20/22)

Channel4.uk.title: Cheers
Channel4.uk.description: Sisterly Love: Can Sam exploit Rebecca and her sister's mutual animosity to get dates with both of them? (S7 Ep21/22)

Channel4.uk.title: Cheers
Channel4.uk.description: Visiting Lecher: A marriage guidance expert who's an old friend of Frasier's comes to town on a book tour. But while preaching marital fidelity, he makes a pass at Rebecca... (S7 Ep22/22)

Channel4.uk.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
Channel4.uk.description: The Visit: Debra's shocked when she suddenly realises that she wishes her own mother was more like Marie... (S3 Ep5)

Channel4.uk.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
Channel4.uk.description: Halloween Candy: Debra thinks that it's Ray's turn to take charge of birth control, so he decides to have his 'wires cut', but then chickens out... (S3 Ep6)

Channel4.uk.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
Channel4.uk.description: Moving Out: Robert decides that he's too old to be living with his parents, so he moves in with another elderly couple - who turn out to be carbon copies of Frank and Marie. (S3 Ep7)

Channel4.uk.title: Frasier
Channel4.uk.description: Boo!: Frasier dresses up as a clown to help cure a patient of her phobia, but ends up giving Martin a shock that leads him to make a major decision. (S11 Ep16)

Channel4.uk.title: Frasier
Channel4.uk.description: Coots and Ladders: Frasier feels guilty after resorting to crime to spice up his life, but his attempts to put things straight have embarrassing consequences. (S11 Ep17)

Channel4.uk.title: Frasier
Channel4.uk.description: Match Game: Frasier hires an attractive professional matchmaker (guest star Laura Linney) but ends up on a string of bad dates. Meanwhile, Niles and Daphne plan a natural birth. (S11 Ep18)

Channel4.uk.title: Frasier
Channel4.uk.description: Miss Right Now: Frasier's disappointed to find out that his attractive matchmaker Charlotte already has a boyfriend. (S11 Ep19)

Channel4.uk.title: American Pickers
Channel4.uk.description: Time Warp: Mike and Frank are stunned by an old tailor shop that's frozen in time, with a bounty of untouched relics, and a secret Prohibition-era bootlegging basement. (S16 Ep11)

Channel4.uk.description: Channel 4's midday news summary.

Channel4.uk.title: Car S.O.S
Channel4.uk.description: Fiesta XR2: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend fix up a partially restored 1980s Ford Fiesta XR2 for Brian, who's been experiencing health problems. (S12 Ep3)

Channel4.uk.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
Channel4.uk.description: In Dumfries and Galloway, Henry Cole gives four bar stools a fluorescent makeover, while Simon O'Brien transforms two old sheep shearer seats into an extraordinary bench. (S5 Ep8)

Channel4.uk.title: Countdown
Channel4.uk.description: Les Dennis, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Dr Ranj Singh in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

Channel4.uk.title: A Place in the Sun
Channel4.uk.description: Lee Juggurnauth helps dog lovers Steve and Heather look for a home in Valencia for £240k. Will a rural retreat and a wine cellar impress, or is Lee barking up the wrong tree?

Channel4.uk.title: A New Life in the Sun
Channel4.uk.description: The new series continues. In Bulgaria, Valentina and Nino hope for a smooth launch of their wellness retreat. Can chateau owners Sharon and David get their business on the map? (S11 Ep23)

Channel4.uk.title: Chateau DIY: Win the Dream
Channel4.uk.description: The new series continues. The three remaining pairs go solo as they create breakfast rooms. Can they demonstrate their own flair while also complementing the chateau's character? (Ep8/20)

Channel4.uk.title: New: A Place in the Sun
Channel4.uk.description: Helen and John look for a perfect Spanish holiday home in Almería for £200k, from a place that divides them to a vivacious villa that has them singing in unison. Will they put in an offer?

Channel4.uk.title: Channel 4 News
Channel4.uk.description: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

Channel4.uk.title: New: Kirstie and Phil's Love It...
Channel4.uk.description: ...or List It: Lisa and Linda's top-heavy Tyneside home holds a lot of memories. Will a complete reconfiguration and rethink give it a second chance, or will pastures new prevail? (S11 Ep5)

Channel4.uk.title: New: Michael Jackson: The Trial
Channel4.uk.description: This series delivers startling new revelations about the 2005 trial of Michael Jackson - with exclusive footage and unheard audio tapes of Jackson, close insiders and the LA police. (Ep1/4)

Channel4.uk.title: New: The Fabulous Funeral Parlour
Channel4.uk.description: In Liverpool, charismatic one-of-a-kind funeral director Hayley helps three families navigating loss to create bespoke and deeply personal farewells to their loved ones.

Channel4.uk.title: Gogglebox
Channel4.uk.description: This time on Gogglebox: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up To Cancer, Tempting Fortune, Fear, Bradley Walsh: Egypt's Cosmic Code, Last One Laughing and With Love, Meghan. (S25 Ep6) [SL]

Channel4.uk.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

Channel4.uk.title: High-Rise
Channel4.uk.description: (2016) Dystopian drama. Tom Hiddleston stars in Ben Wheatley's adaptation of JG Ballard's novel. Life for the inhabitants of a huge luxury tower block descends into savage anarchy. [SL]

Channel4.uk.title: Mission to Space with Francis...
Channel4.uk.description: ...Bourgeois: Francis battles with the extreme challenges of astronaut training. Is he prepared to keep going? After all, there may be more than one way to reach for the stars. (Ep2/2) [SL]

Channel4.uk.title: Jamie's 5 Ingredient Meals

Channel4.uk.title: Cheers

Channel4.uk.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
Channel4.uk.description: The Article: Ray's jealous when an inexperienced colleague beats him to his lifelong ambition of having an article published in Sports Illustrated. (S3 Ep8)

Channel4.uk.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

Channel4.uk.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
Channel4.uk.description: No Fat: Frank's not happy when Marie decides that they should both go on a strict diet just before Thanksgiving. (S3 Ep10)

Channel4.uk.title: Frasier
Channel4.uk.description: And Frasier Makes Three: Frasier goes out to dinner with his attractive matchmaker Charlotte... and her boyfriend Frank. (S11 Ep20)

Channel4.uk.title: Frasier
Channel4.uk.description: Detour: Frasier and Charlotte are stranded in the middle of nowhere when Frasier's car suddenly breaks down. Niles plans Martin's stag party. (S11 Ep21)

Channel4.uk.title: Frasier
Channel4.uk.description: Crock Tales: Frasier considers throwing out an old pot, but it brings back memories, including the time he accidentally glued himself to an obnoxious blind date. (S11 Ep22)

Channel4.uk.title: Frasier
Channel4.uk.description: Goodnight Seattle (Part 1/2): With Charlotte (Laura Linney) about to leave for Chicago, Frasier is offered a job in San Francisco. (S11 Ep23)

Channel4.uk.title: American Pickers
Channel4.uk.description: Concrete Jungle: Mike and Frank pick New York City for the first time, and go back to the future at a sprawling computer store packed with 20th-century technology. (S16 Ep12)

Channel4.uk.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
Channel4.uk.description: In Dumfries and Galloway, Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien find an electric organ and a vintage oil dispenser in Maggie's barns, which are brimming with junk. (S5 Ep9)

Channel4.uk.title: Chateau DIY: Win the Dream
Channel4.uk.description: The new series continues. It's crunch time as the renovators' breakfast rooms are scrutinised. Who will progress to the chateau event challenge, and whose dream ends here? (Ep9/20)

Channel4.uk.description: George B and George S want a countryside charmer in France's Haute-Vienne region for £75k. Will a quirky cottage with a gorgeous garden, a former forge or a magical farmhouse be the one?

Channel4.uk.title: New: George Clarke's Building Home

Channel4.uk.title: New: Michael Jackson: The Trial
Channel4.uk.description: After Jackson admits on TV that he shares his bed with a child, a police raid on Neverland Ranch reveals disturbing evidence of a warped world of secret rooms and odd mannequins. (Ep2/4)

Channel4.uk.title: 24 Hours in A&E
Channel4.uk.description: After a car mounts the pavement, pedestrians with serious injuries are brought into A&E. Jodie's cut her leg on glass on a night out. And is 61-year-old Crispin having a stroke? (S34 Ep7)

Channel4.uk.title: 24 Hours in A&E
Channel4.uk.description: Harry has fallen off his scooter and badly cut his head. A 56-year-old has crashed his motorbike at speed and now his leg's at risk. And Mike hurt himself putting out the rubbish. (S34 Ep8)

Channel4Plus1.uk.title: New: Secret Genius with Alan...
Channel4Plus1.uk.description: ...Carr & Susie Dent: Twelve new contestants face a 'wheely' hard word game and a confectionary test. But with few final places up for grabs, it won't be a sweet ending for some... (Ep2/6)

Channel4Plus1.uk.title: Catching a Killer
Channel4Plus1.uk.description: Buried Truths: When Cumali Turhan is reported missing, Essex Police suspect foul play. And when a witness sees Turhan's body thrown out with the rubbish, a murder enquiry begins.

Channel4Plus1.uk.title: 999: What Happened Next
Channel4Plus1.uk.description: A car is in flames. A thief is fatally stabbed. A 999 call comes in and an investigation begins. But if nothing is what it first seems, can the police bring the guilty to justice? (Ep1)

Channel4Plus1.uk.title: New: Walter Presents: The Pushover
Channel4Plus1.uk.description: Danish thriller. A North Zealand police inspector and a Copenhagen journalist follow separate leads towards chilling secrets when a conman is implicated in a murder. In Danish/subs. (Ep1)

Channel4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
Channel4Plus1.uk.description: Hotel Chester: Gordon visits Mississippi to rescue the failing Hotel Chester. The owner has 40 years' experience in the hotel industry but is struggling to make things work. (S2 Ep4/8) [SL]

Channel4Plus1.uk.title: David Baddiel: Cat Man
Channel4Plus1.uk.description: David challenges the notion that cats aren't a guy thing, meets some life-saving cats and explores the ways we can honour our feline family members. (Ep3/3) [SL]

Channel4Plus1.uk.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or...
Channel4Plus1.uk.description: ...List It: Kirstie revisits Julie and Allen, who decided to list their house and move to a home next to Allen's favourite pub. But did they follow through on their decision? (S6 Ep5)

Channel4Plus1.uk.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or...
Channel4Plus1.uk.description: ...List It: Brilliant Builds: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back on Sarah and Ian Renard's two-bed rural renovation in Brixworth that didn't compromise on character.

Channel4Plus1.uk.title: Kirstie's House of Craft
Channel4Plus1.uk.description: Kirstie Allsopp shows us how to create beautiful crafts with items we already own. This time, Kirstie turns trash into treasure with Mexican tin art, soap recycling and a tin can dog.

Channel4Plus1.uk.description: Hot Rocks: Sam brings a VIP guest back to the bar, but when Rebecca loses her diamond earrings, she thinks he might have stolen them and promises Sam anything to get them back. (S7 Ep17/22)

Channel4Plus1.uk.description: What's Up, Doc?: Sam tries to get a date with a beautiful psychiatrist who works with Frasier and Lilith, but when she won't agree he makes an appointment to see her. (S7 Ep18/22)

Channel4Plus1.uk.title: Cheers
Channel4Plus1.uk.description: The Gift of the Woodi: Rebecca decides to sharpen her image and asks Lilith for advice on power-dressing. Woody can't compete when it comes to expensive presents for Kelly. (S7 Ep19/22)

Channel4Plus1.uk.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
Channel4Plus1.uk.description: Driving Frank: When Frank backs into Robert's police car, Debra decides that he's not a safe driver and the kids should no longer travel in his car. (S3 Ep2)

Channel4Plus1.uk.description: The Sitter: Debra decides to undermine the babysitter's popularity when she finds out how much the children like her, but all does not go to plan. (S3 Ep3)

Channel4Plus1.uk.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
Channel4Plus1.uk.description: Getting Even: Ray embarrasses Debra at a school auction but then worries about the ways in which she could get revenge. (S3 Ep4)

Channel4Plus1.uk.description: Caught in the Act: Frasier agrees to get Roz tickets for Alice to see child entertainer Nanny G, who also happens to be his ex-wife. (S11 Ep15)

Channel4Plus1.uk.description: Hydro Homestead: The guys try to buy from a super-handyman on a unique homestead, but will his deal-making end the pick before it even gets going? (S16 Ep10)

UAndDave.uk.title: Will & Ralf Should Know Better
UAndDave.uk.description: Teamwork: Will Mellor and Ralf Little test their teamwork skills driving a tank blindfolded, competing in wheelchair basketball, and rescuing 'survivors' during an earthquake emergency. S2 Ep1

UAndDave.uk.title: Taskmaster
UAndDave.uk.description: We Met At Mealtimes: The competitors use their ingenuity with snowy globes, rubbery ducks and wooden-y spoons to impress Taskmaster Greg Davies. S6 Ep6

UAndDave.uk.title: Mock the Week
UAndDave.uk.description: Dara O Briain and Hugh Dennis welcome guests Angela Barnes, Ed Byrne, Kerry Godliman, Milton Jones and Chris Washington. S18 Ep10

UAndDave.uk.title: Would I Lie To You?
UAndDave.uk.description: Rob Brydon hosts the witty panel show about fanciful facts and plausible porkies. Joining David Mitchell and Lee Mack are Michael Ball, Charlie Brooker and Reece Shearsmith. S3 Ep8

UAndDave.uk.title: Would I Lie To You?
UAndDave.uk.description: Surely royalty wouldn't lie? Danny Dyer is among the famous fibbers in the award-winning comedy panel show. Jon Richardson, Joe Lycett and Moira Stuart also adopt poker faces. S9 Ep1

UAndDave.uk.title: Not Going Out
UAndDave.uk.description: Football: When Lee goes to watch Benji playing football for a local under-13 team, he becomes the competitive dad that all other parents want to avoid. S13 Ep7

UAndDave.uk.title: Not Going Out Christmas Special: Wilfred
UAndDave.uk.description: Lee makes a big effort to create the perfect Christmas for his family by agreeing to Lucy's wish to do something charitable and inviting a lonely old pensioner to join them.

UAndDave.uk.title: Gadget Man
UAndDave.uk.description: Health and Safety: Fearing that the world is a dangerous place, Richard tests security devices with Keith Allen and Bill Bailey that include a post-apocalypse survival kit for festivals too. S4 Ep4

UAndDave.uk.title: Teleshopping
UAndDave.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndDave.uk.title: Teleshopping
UAndDave.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndDave.uk.title: James May's Things You Need To Know About Science
UAndDave.uk.description: Evolution: James May treks off to find out how Charles Darwin's theory of natural selection explains why we are all mutants and what war is actually good for. S2 Ep3

UAndDave.uk.title: James May's Things You Need To Know About Science
UAndDave.uk.description: Speed: James explains all we need to know about speed - including how to dodge a hurricane - with a fast-moving mix of animation and motion graphics. S2 Ep4

UAndDave.uk.title: Border Force America's Gatekeepers
UAndDave.uk.description: More than 100 boxes full of drugs are discovered inside an unlikely vehicle at the World Trade Bridge. In Progreso, a suspected gang member attempts to cross into the US. S2 Ep9

UAndDave.uk.title: Border Force America's Gatekeepers
UAndDave.uk.description: A man kidnapped by a Mexican drug cartel flees across the bridge into America. At Progreso International Bridge, a woman is caught hiding anti-anxiety pills. S2 Ep10

UAndDave.uk.title: How Britain Worked
UAndDave.uk.description: Guy Martin visits Llandudno in north Wales to try to return the seaside resort to its former Victorian glory, work on restoring its pier, and service its funicular tramway. S1 Ep3

UAndDave.uk.title: Rick Stein's Road to Mexico
UAndDave.uk.description: Yucatan: Rick's journey begins to draw to a close as he heads east from Oaxaca to the Yucatan Peninsula, a place once frequented by real pirates of the Caribbean and our own Sir Francis Drake. S1 Ep7

UAndDave.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndDave.uk.description: Bedford Caravanette/MGC: An impressive collection of five iconic cars arrives at Thornton le Dale, including a 1967 Crayford Corsair and a 1966 Ford Zodiac which emerge from a garage in Selby. S4 Ep3

UAndDave.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndDave.uk.description: Cortina 2000E/Daimler V250: Nothing screams 1970s more than a Mk3 Ford Cortina 2000E. Derek Mathewson heads to Brigg to value a 1974 example with classic Coke bottle styling and a Pinto engine. S4 Ep4

UAndDave.uk.title: Extreme Fishing with Robson Green
UAndDave.uk.description: USA: The actor grapples with catfish on the Tennessee River, searches for blackfin tuna in the Gulf of Mexico, and faces an alligator gar in Nashville. S1 Ep2

UAndDave.uk.title: Top Gear
UAndDave.uk.description: Motoring mania. A trio of convertibles have gone to Iceland - the Audi TT, Nissan 350Z and Chrysler Crossfire. Composer Tim Rice hopes to perform well in the Reasonably Priced Car. S6 Ep8

UAndDave.uk.title: Top Gear
UAndDave.uk.description: The motoring show that pulls no punches. Jezza reviews BMW's M5. Richard and James try their hand at Russian roulette road testing. And what's the hottest hatchback? S6 Ep9

UAndDave.uk.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
UAndDave.uk.description: Atlantic: The Bikers explore the 'special relationship' between America and Britain's culinary cultures by making a rich clam chowder and chocolate brownies. S2 Ep14

UAndDave.uk.title: Rick Stein's Road to Mexico
UAndDave.uk.description: Yucatan: Rick's journey begins to draw to a close as he heads east from Oaxaca to the Yucatan Peninsula, a place once frequented by real pirates of the Caribbean and our own Sir Francis Drake. S1 Ep7

UAndDave.uk.title: Would I Lie To You?
UAndDave.uk.description: You wouldn't let it lie! Bob Mortimer guests on the very witty panel show, where fact and fiction entwine. Gabby Logan, Katherine Parkinson and Steve Backshall also appear. S9 Ep2

UAndDave.uk.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
UAndDave.uk.description: Presenter Toby Anstis, comedy actor Kerry Howard, stand-up Evelyn Mok and all-round personality Joe Sugg pit their wits against the best-selling author's tricky challenges. S6 Ep22

UAndDave.uk.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
UAndDave.uk.description: Gardening expert Diarmuid Gavin, antiques guru Roo Irvine, comedian John Kearns and musician Claire Richards compete to win the Pointless friend's sought-after trophy. S6 Ep27

UAndDave.uk.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
UAndDave.uk.description: Katherine Ryan hosts an extended edition of the satirical quiz, with Andy Hamilton and Cariad Lloyd joining team captains Ian Hislop and Paul Merton. S57 Ep5

UAndDave.uk.description: Jumpers: Leap for joy as Stephen Fry hosts another edition of the stimulating quiz and Julian Clary, Ross Noble, Bill Bailey and Alan Davies tackle posers on jumping. S10 Ep11

UAndDave.uk.description: Roadkill Doused In Syrup: Greg Davies sets the tasks as Tim Vine encounters a wet bra, Alice Levine barely attempts cricket, and Russell Howard makes a convincing liger. S6 Ep7

UAndDave.uk.description: Dermot O'Leary hosts the game show as the cast of Magic Mike Live, a rampaging spider, and comedians including Thanyia Moore test a studio audience's resolve to win 250,000 pounds. S1 Ep2

UAndDave.uk.description: Officers discover the fuel tanks on a truck are full of liquid meth. Three men wearing identical clothing cause suspicion. A man is caught smuggling reptiles. S3 Ep2

UAndDave.uk.description: Guy Martin and a team from the Black Country Living Museum restore a Newcomen engine, an 18th-century steam-powered device used principally to pump water out of mines. S1 Ep4

UAndDave.uk.description: Rick's journey begins in Dieppe with turbot straight off the boats, followed by a forage for sea herbs along the Bay of the Somme. S1 Ep1

UAndDave.uk.description: Ford Cosworth/Morgan 4/4: Dave goes to Wales to bag a Sierra Cosworth, a sought-after car in the bidding market. Dad Derek gets his hands on a more sedate 1926 Standard Tourer. S4 Ep5

UAndDave.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndDave.uk.description: Bentley S3/BSA 3-wheeler: Derek heads to Suffolk to collect two Bentleys with a majestic pedigree; Cynthia a stunning 1963 S3 and Harry, a 1965 Continental. S4 Ep6

UAndDave.uk.description: South Africa: The actor travels to South Africa and finds himself in shark-infested waters while paddle skiing, catches an octopus, and tries his hand at reef fishing. S1 Ep3

UAndDave.uk.description: Motoring mayhem courtesy of the usual team. Jeremy makes a splash at a local swimming pool with a Rolls Royce Silver Shadow MK1 and James travels back to the 70s in a Maserati Bora. S6 Ep10

UAndDave.uk.title: Top Gear
UAndDave.uk.description: Jezza and the team find out if driving a Lamborghini Murcielago roadster gives the same kick as 12 angry bulls. Actor Timothy Spall is Mr (Corner) Turner as he takes to the track. S6 Ep11

UAndDave.uk.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
UAndDave.uk.description: 1960s: More homegrown fun with food as Dave and Si return to the 1960s, prepare Steak Diane and profiteroles, and discover the height of 1960s dining. S2 Ep15

UAndDave.uk.description: Rick's journey begins in Dieppe with turbot straight off the boats, followed by a forage for sea herbs along the Bay of the Somme. S1 Ep1

UAndDave.uk.description: Dara O Briain and Hugh Dennis present a special edition of the topical comedy show featuring best bits and unseen material. S18 Ep12

UAndDave.uk.description: Has punk poet John Cooper Clarke got the slippery quality needed to excel on the devious comedy panel show? Greg Davies, Alex Jones and Rick Edwards also join the regulars. S9 Ep3

UAndDave.uk.description: Dermot O'Leary hosts the game show as some special fire performers, a stripping Jedward, and comedians including Suzi Ruffell test a studio audience's resolve to win 250,000 pounds. S1 Ep3

UAndDave.uk.title: Silence is Golden
UAndDave.uk.description: Dermot O'Leary hosts the game show as a dad's naughty secrets and comedians including Amy Gledhill and Huge Davies test a studio audience's resolve to win 250,000 pounds. S1 Ep4

UAndDave.uk.description: Malaysia: For this stop on his global gastronomic adventure, Gordon Ramsay visits Malaysia as he harvests nests for birds' nest soup and samples a broth made from bull penis. S2 Ep3

UAndDave.uk.title: Border Force America's Gatekeepers
UAndDave.uk.description: A woman is suspected of smuggling someone else's baby over the border. Drugs are found hidden in a consignment of carrots. A pill smuggler is caught following an earlier tip-off. S3 Ep3

UAndDave.uk.title: Border Force America's Gatekeepers
UAndDave.uk.description: A man travelling with two children that aren't his is questioned. A traveller is caught smuggling cash. Officers find drugs in a flat-bed truck. S3 Ep4

UAndDave.uk.title: How Britain Worked
UAndDave.uk.description: Guy Martin helps with the restoration of the oldest surviving Brixham sailing trawler and discovers how Britain acquired its taste for fish and chips. S1 Ep5

UAndDave.uk.title: Rick Stein's Secret France
UAndDave.uk.description: Rick Stein's journey takes him through France's eastern border regions of Alsace and Jura, home to his favourite French dish, choucroute garni, and favourite French cheese, comte. S1 Ep2

UAndDave.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndDave.uk.description: Dodge Bus/VX2300 Police Car: Dave heads to West Yorkshire for a 1926 Dodge bus. Derek gets his hands on a rare Vauxhall Victor VX 90 police car expected to sell for more than a few coppers. S4 Ep7

UAndDave.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndDave.uk.description: Lancia Fulvia/Rover P5B Motorhome: Dave heads to Bolton to pick up a classic Italian sports car - a Lancia Fulvia 1.3 Sport styled by Milan coachbuilder Zagato. S4 Ep8

UAndDave.uk.title: Extreme Fishing with Robson Green
UAndDave.uk.description: Spain and the Azores: The actor hunts for blue marlin in the North Atlantic, samples a marine delicacy in the Canary Islands and searches for giant catfish in Spain. S1 Ep4

UAndDave.uk.title: Top Gear
UAndDave.uk.description: The lads head for the Isle of Man to decide which is best - the V8 Vantage Aston Martin, BMW M6 or Porsche 911 Carrera S. Trevor Eve is today's Star in a Reasonably Priced Car. S7 Ep1

UAndDave.uk.description: Frenzied four-wheeled fun with talkative trio Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May. The boys review the Porsche Cayman and chat to ex-Arsenal striker Ian Wright. S7 Ep2

UAndDave.uk.description: Sheep: The Bikers focus on sheep which have provided us with milk, meat and wool for thousands of years - dishes include mechoui lamb and a hogget and barley stew. S2 Ep16

E4Plus1.uk.description: Aspiring rapper Matt meets music producer Breda. Abbie warms up a tongue-tied Matt. And can dynamic grandma Karen give retired teacher Jim's dating game a much-needed boost? (S22 Ep9)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: On the box this time: Game of Talents, Line of Duty, Catfish UK: The TV Show, Cher & the Loneliest Elephant, and the News on Prince Philip's funeral. (S17 Ep9)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Naked Attraction
E4Plus1.uk.description: Fitness fan Rose feels her body's getting all the attention, and her love life's struggling. Basingstoke barista Clarissa seeks her dream woman. Will the naked pods bring joy? (S4 Ep6)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Cowboy Country: New couple Lainey and Barry talk Murray into watching a football match with Lainey's dad Bill, but the two fathers support opposing teams. (S2 Ep12)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Van People: Erica and Barry buy a shabby second-hand van. And Adam gets suspended when he objects to being voted 'nicest guy' in the school yearbook. (S2 Ep13)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Don't Tell the Bride
E4Plus1.uk.description: The One with the Dinosaurs: Elle has her heart set on a classy wedding at Liverpool's iconic Liver Building. But Phil plans a big day to go down in history.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: In Your Head: Luke goes missing after a night out. Can Manny, Phil and Gloria find him? Haley tries to land an interview with the creator of a big lifestyle website. (S9 Ep13)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Written in the Stars: Phil thinks that Gloria is upset with Jay for dropping the ball on Valentine's Day, so he convinces Jay to spice things up with a little role playing. (S9 Ep14)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
E4Plus1.uk.description: A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister, Rude(ish) Tube, featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorbike and bicycle variety.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Mama Maria's: Gordon Ramsay visits Mama Maria's, a failing restaurant in Brooklyn, New York, where owner John is overwhelmed by running a business that's become stuck in the past. (S6 Ep3) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Ms Jean's Southern Cuisine: Gordon's in Pennsylvania to help rescue a soul food restaurant that was opened 12 years ago by a retired special education teacher. (S6 Ep4) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Recipe for Death II: Kiss the Cook: Adam asks Murray for money to film his own action movie, while Erica and Beverly go shopping for clothes. (S4 Ep6)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Ho-ly K.I.T.T.: A shared love of the TV show Knight Rider brings Murray and his brother Marvin together. Beverly invites Lainey and Bill to Thanksgiving dinner. (S4 Ep7)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: All Things Being Equal: Gloria, Claire, Haley, Alex, Lily, Luke and Manny each have very different ways of supporting gender equality. (S8 Ep20)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Alone Time: Everyone deserves a little alone time, but when Mitch and Jay separately seek out a much-needed retreat from the family, they end up at the same resort. (S8 Ep21)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Barefoot Bob's: Gordon visits Barefoot Bob's beachside restaurant in Massachusetts, where husband and wife Marc and Lisa struggle to attract customers during the winter months. (S6 Ep5)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Gordon revisits Café Hon in Baltimore, Chiarella's in Philadelphia, and Leone's in New Jersey, to find out whether the owners have taken his advice on board. (S6 Ep16)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Windbreaker City: The team are assigned the role of hostages at a Homeland Security counter-terrorism training exercise. (S2 Ep15)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Wednesday Incident: When Peralta notices that Captain Holt is in a bad mood, he teams up with Holt's husband Kevin to find out what's gone wrong. (S2 Ep16)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Smart and Smarter: Lisa searches for a new identity when she worries that her position as the clever Simpson is under threat from Maggie. (S15 Ep13/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Ziff Who Came to Dinner: The Simpsons find Marge's high school prom date Artie Ziff squatting in their loft, and he's planning to frame Homer... (S15 Ep14/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Kara-te Kid: Inspired by the Karate Kid films, Adam and the other Adam Goldberg face off in a karate match to settle their long-running feud for good. (S4 Ep16)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Baré: When Lainey wins a scholarship to a top art college, Barry considers modifying his dream of becoming a doctor to go with her. (S4 Ep18)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Tough Love: After leaving his real estate firm to strike out on his own, Phil decides that a solo camping trip in the wild is just what he needs to boost his confidence. (S9 Ep9)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: He Said, She Shed: The homeowners association deny Claire's request to build a 'She Shed' in the garden, and only Luke and Phil know the real reason why. (S9 Ep11)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Funeral: Another personnel change at the precinct puts Peralta and Santiago's budding relationship at risk. Meanwhile, Boyle is attracted to a fellow officer. (S3 Ep2)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Boyle's Hunch: Peralta thinks Boyle might have found his soul-mate in art gallery owner Genevieve. Diaz deals with a case of theft in the precinct building. (S3 Ep3)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: You Only Move Twice: Homer is offered a new job by mysterious businessman Hank Scorpio. But will Marge, Bart and Lisa be happy in their idyllic new home town? (S8 Ep2/25)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Homer They Fall: Homer becomes a boxer, thanks to his abnormally hard head. But is his skull strong enough for a fight against heavyweight champion Drederick Tatum? (S8 Ep3/25)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Brand new series - Bottle Episode: Homer must transport a million-dollar bottle of wine to Mr Burns's mansion. And for once, it's not actually him who screws it up. (S36 Ep11)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Bob Next Door: Bart becomes convinced that his new neighbour Walt is really his vengeful arch-enemy Sideshow Bob (Kelsey Grammer) in disguise. (S21 Ep22/23)

E4Plus1.uk.title: First Dates
E4Plus1.uk.description: Relentless optimist Charlie has a heart-to-heart with emotional osteopath Benji. And will single mum Rachel be happy to roll with divorced toilet paper salesman Stephen? (S22 Ep6)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: On the box this time, Line of Duty, I Can See Your Voice, Beat the Chasers, Sex and the City, My Octopus Teacher, The Earth at Night in Color, and ITV News (PM's phone number). (S17 Ep11)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: On the box this time, SAS: Who Dares Wins, Dragons' Den, Three Families, Headspace: Guide to Sleep, Secret Crush, Lego Masters USA, This Morning and BBC News (holidays). (S17 Ep12)

Film4.uk.title: Chevalier
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Exuberant historical costume drama. Kelvin Harrison Jr stars as prodigiously talented French-Caribbean swordsman and  composer Joseph Bologne, who literally out-fiddled Mozart.

Film4.uk.title: Blue Bayou
Film4.uk.description: (2021) Justin Chon's poignant drama about a man of Korean descent who is threatened with deportation from the US even though he was adopted into an American family when he was three.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Santa Fe
Film4.uk.description: (1951) Western starring Randolph Scott. Four brothers leave the defeated South to seek jobs as the US recovers from the Civil War. As one becomes a railwayman, the others turn to crime.

Film4.uk.title: The Black Arrow
Film4.uk.description: (1948) Historical adventure. A man (Louis Hayward) returns from the Wars of the Roses to learn from his uncle that a family friend has killed his father. But is everything as it seems?

Film4.uk.title: To Hell and Back
Film4.uk.description: (1955) Fact-based wartime drama. Audie Murphy, America's most decorated soldier in WWII, plays himself in this dramatic recreation of the valiant heroics that earned him the honours.

Film4.uk.title: Censor Interview Special
Film4.uk.description: Star Niamh Algar and director Prano Bailey-Bond talk about making their new psychological horror film, Censor.

Film4.uk.title: Canyon Passage
Film4.uk.description: (1946) Frontier western starring Dana Andrews. An ambitious businessman journeys to rural Oregon where a complex web of life and love waits to ensnare him. Directed by Jacques Tourneur.

Film4.uk.title: Legends of the Fall
Film4.uk.description: (1994) Oscar-winning turn-of-the-century drama with Brad Pitt and Anthony Hopkins. A Montana patriarch's son falls for his brother's fiancée, setting off a tragic chain of events.

Film4.uk.title: A Man Called Otto
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Darkly-tinged but ultimately feel-good comedy starring Tom Hanks as a grumpy misanthrope who spends his time badgering people into following society's rules. But why is he like this?

Film4.uk.title: Our Kind of Traitor
Film4.uk.description: (2014) Thriller about a British couple who get drawn into a Russian mafia conspiracy. With Ewan McGregor, Naomie Harris, Stellan Skarsgård and Damian Lewis. Based on John le Carré's novel.

Film4.uk.title: Night of the 12th
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Award-winning, gritty true-crime drama following a faltering police investigation into the grisly murder of a young woman. With Bastien Bouillon and Bouli Lanners. In French/subs.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: The Shepherd of the Hills
Film4.uk.description: (1941) John Wayne stars as a moody young man living in the Ozarks who has sworn revenge on his long-absent father for deserting his mother. Then a kindly stranger appears on the scene...

Film4.uk.title: The Mouse That Roared
Film4.uk.description: (1959) Satirical comedy starring Peter Sellers (in a triple role) and the original Doctor Who, William Hartnell. The world's smallest state, Grand Fenwick, declares war on the USA.

Film4.uk.title: They Rode West
Film4.uk.description: (1954) Tough western. A cavalry doctor (Robert Francis) discovers a Native American tribe is dying of malaria, but his by-the-book captain (Phil Carey) refuses to allow their treatment.

Film4.uk.title: Shenandoah
Film4.uk.description: (1965) Western. James Stewart stars as a wealthy Virginia farming patriarch trying to keep his family together and safe in the midst of the encroaching American Civil War.

Film4.uk.title: Oblivion
Film4.uk.description: (2013) Sci-fi action-mystery set on a war-ravaged planet Earth that's been largely abandoned by humanity. With Tom Cruise, Andrea Riseborough, Olga Kurylenko and Morgan Freeman.

Film4.uk.title: Beau Is Afraid
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Joaquin Phoenix stars in Ari Aster's fantastical odyssey about an anxiety-riddled man-boy working his way through a variety of psychological horrors to visit his domineering mother.

Film4.uk.title: Public Enemies
Film4.uk.description: (2009) Michael Mann directs Johnny Depp as infamous bank robber John Dillinger; Marion Cotillard as Dillinger's sorta girl; and Christian Bale as the FBI agent trying to put him away.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Local Hero
Film4.uk.description: (1983) Comedy starring Peter Riegert, Burt Lancaster and Peter Capaldi. A US oil company executive tries to persuade a small Scottish seaside community to sell up their entire village.

Film4.uk.title: Hail the Conquering Hero
Film4.uk.description: (1944) Satirical wartime comedy starring Eddie Bracken as a man who becomes a celebrated war hero despite having been medically discharged from the marines after only a few weeks.

Film4.uk.title: Gun Fury
Film4.uk.description: (1953) Western. Rock Hudson stars as a California-bound settler who must ride 1500 miles to the Mexican border to rescue his fiancée (Donna Reed) after she's abducted by an outlaw.

Film4.uk.title: Jason and the Argonauts
Film4.uk.description: (1963) Classic interpretation of the Greek myth of Jason's quest to find the Golden Fleece, boasting the enduring work of special effects maestro Ray Harryhausen. Directed by Don Chaffey.

Film4.uk.title: Moon
Film4.uk.description: (2009) Psychological sci-fi thriller. Sam Rockwell stars as a man who lives alone on the moon overseeing a mining operation. His time's nearly done, but he's started to go a bit peculiar...

Film4.uk.title: The Pope's Exorcist
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Supernatural horror starring Russell Crowe, loosely based on the memoirs of a 'real' exorcist. A case of demonic possession in Spain connects to dark secrets from the Inquisition.

Film4.uk.title: S.W.A.T.
Film4.uk.description: (2003) Action with Colin Farrell and Samuel L Jackson. A loose canon joins an elite force to escort a fugitive to chokey. But the baddie's put a reward out for help with his escape.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Knock at the Cabin
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (2023) M Night Shyamalan's jarringly intimate end-of-days horror with Dave Bautista. An armed group insist that a family of three must make an impossible life-or-death choice.

UAndW.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndW.uk.description: Rusty, Doug & Buster: Beloved overweight Bulldog Buster needs new knees, while a pug called Doug requires a risky spinal surgery to remove a cyst - with no guarantee he will recover. S5 Ep2

UAndW.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndW.uk.description: Betsy, Beau & Rosie: Noel tries to save Betsy the cat's leg by cutting out a tumour and replacing her knee with a unique bionic implant, while Beau needs surgery for hip dysplasia. S5 Ep3

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux: A Place For Paedophiles
UAndW.uk.description: Louis gains access to Coalinga State Hospital in California, which houses more than 500 convicted paedophiles - most of whom have been deemed unsafe for release.

UAndW.uk.title: Death at the Mansion: Rebecca Zahau
UAndW.uk.description: The Case of Rebecca Zahau: We examine the case of Rebecca Zahau, who was found hanging naked, bound and gagged in her boyfriend's home, two days after his son died in her care. S1 Ep1

UAndW.uk.title: The Wheel
UAndW.uk.description: Three contestants hope to walk away with a fortune, guided by seven celebrities. Can Strictly's Shirley Ballas, DJ Jo Whiley and naturalist Chris Packham help them win big? S1 Ep10

UAndW.uk.title: Teleshopping
UAndW.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndW.uk.title: MasterChef Australia
UAndW.uk.description: Guest chef Donato Toce reveals his superb Viennetta ice cream cake, and contestants must replicate the nostalgic dessert or risk being frozen out of the kitchen. S15 Ep17

UAndW.uk.title: Tipping Point
UAndW.uk.description: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning its 10,000 pound jackpot. S10 Ep94

UAndW.uk.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
UAndW.uk.description: Bristol: The DIY SOS team and volunteers in Bristol help to transform the home of 24-year-old Ryan, who has spent the last five years in hospital 50 miles away from his family. S29 Ep1

UAndW.uk.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
UAndW.uk.description: Telford: In Shropshire, three schoolchildren, the DIY SOS team and hundreds of volunteers help 12-year-old Matthew return home from hospital for the first time in three years. S29 Ep2

UAndW.uk.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
UAndW.uk.description: The Million Pound Build for Children in Need: The team head to Swansea to build a centre and supported housing for young people in care and leaving care for the Roots Foundation Wales. S29 Ep3

UAndW.uk.title: My Dream Home
UAndW.uk.description: Property renovation series hosted by Drew Scott and Jonathan Scott. In this edition they help Anne and Luca find a budget dream home in the city. S4 Ep8

UAndW.uk.title: My Dream Home
UAndW.uk.description: Drew Scott and Jonathan Scott help another couple find their dream home. Nicole and Colby are hoping to find a dog-friendly home where they can put down roots. S4 Ep9

UAndW.uk.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
UAndW.uk.description: Bristol: The DIY SOS team and volunteers in Bristol help to transform the home of 24-year-old Ryan, who has spent the last five years in hospital 50 miles away from his family. S29 Ep1

UAndW.uk.title: My Kitchen Rules New Zealand
UAndW.uk.description: The teams prepare a 6-course degustation menu for Kiwi celebrities in aid of a local charity, but at the end of the night another team will be going home. S5 Ep7

UAndW.uk.title: One Born Every Minute
UAndW.uk.description: The fly-on-the-wall series filmed in the maternity unit at Liverpool Women's Hospital. After being born herself at this hospital, Kirsty returns to have a baby of her own. S9 Ep1

UAndW.uk.title: One Born Every Minute
UAndW.uk.description: Another visit to the maternity ward at Liverpool Women's Hospital. The maternity ward is full. Self-confessed princess Sarah and partner Chris arrive eight weeks early. S9 Ep2

UAndW.uk.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake
UAndW.uk.description: Crumble's Big Adventure: Pete meets Staffy Boxer Cross Crumble, who's been at the centre in Basildon for over three years, stuck without a foster or permanent home in sight. S3 Ep5

UAndW.uk.title: Inside the Ambulance
UAndW.uk.description: Jo and Ash deal with a patient whose chronic cough leaves him struggling to breathe, while Joel and Nic treat a man who's fallen from a ladder while wielding a hedge trimmer. S13 Ep3

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux's LA Stories: Among The Sex Offenders
UAndW.uk.description: In his final LA Story, Louis Theroux spends time in the twilight world of the city's paroled sex offenders, who live under force of tough regulations.

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux: Altered...

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Abandoned Engineering

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
